description_long: This is a compact, stylized rifle with a predominantly yellow, weathered finish and black scuff marks, giving it a rugged, industrial appearance. The body features angular, geometric lines and a robust frame, with a prominent top rail and a thick, short barrel. The grip and magazine area are heavily reinforced, with visible mechanical details and a unique, almost sci-fi design. The magazine is depicted as a separate, rectangular component, positioned below the main body. The rifle lacks traditional wood or polymer textures, instead appearing to be constructed from metal with a matte, slightly rough surface. The overall design suggests a modern, possibly futuristic firearm intended for urban tactical use.
description: A compact, yellow, industrial-style rifle with a weathered finish, angular lines, and a separate rectangular magazine. The design is robust and modern, with visible mechanical details and a matte metal surface.
description_view_0: The left side of the rifle shows the full body, grip, and the separate magazine below, highlighting the angular frame and mechanical details.
description_view_1: A direct side-on view, showing the rifle's narrow profile and the alignment of the barrel and top rail.
description_view_2: The right side of the rifle, mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the grip, magazine, and mechanical reinforcements.
description_view_3: A front-facing view, showing the barrel opening, the symmetry of the design, and the magazine directly below.
